north_star: Go Workflow Stack can be designed, built, verified, and continued from repo-local .go state.
wedge: Reusable repo-local agent workflow stack. Make go/go-auto/go-loop practical: route rough Viggo commands, create or repair repo-local .go state, execute autonomously inside safety gates, validate with tests, and document exact operator usage.
target_user: Viggo and future autonomous agents continuing this project.
core_promise: A single go spike/go auto loop can turn rough intent into repo, vision, principles, tasks, verified work, reflection, and concise handoff.
